validate_pr_title.description: Validate PR title follows NEM-XX naming convention
validate_pr_title.message: PR title must follow format: NEM-<number>: <description>

validate_commit_message.description: Validate commit messages follow NEM-XX format
validate_commit_message.message: Commit must start with NEM-<number>: (no Conventional Commits)
validate_commit_message.example: NEM-28: fix type checking errors in intelligence module

prettier_check.description: Ensure code formatting is consistent with prettier
